---
title: "Silas' Scientific Skills"
---

## Welcome Scholars and Interns!

This is the central hub for the summer skills course! Here, you will find all the necessary workflows to follow along in this course.

The skills that will be covered in this course include:

-  Cloud services (e.g. OneDrive, TEAMS)

- File management and naming

- Data management and analysis

- Literature review reference management

- Microsoft suite (Word, PowerPoint, Outlook, Excel)

- Organization

- Presenting scientific information

- Professional communication

-  The scientific method

- Scientific writing
